problem id: 8789bd45
category: bit_manipulation

rule: ROT(7) AND NOT SHL(5)

examples:
  11100101 -> 01010010
  10011101 -> 01001110
  00101010 -> 00010101
  00011110 -> 00001111
  10111011 -> 10011101
  00101110 -> 00010111
  11111001 -> 11011100
  01110100 -> 00111010
  10110100 -> 01011010

query: 00100100
predicted answer: 00010010
